description: Dark-navy infographic card. The background is a dim, blue-tinted photograph of a warehouse interior with a faint American flag and the embossed U.S. Department of Labor seal centered at the top. Four white strips with torn-paper edges are stacked vertically, each showing an outlet masthead and a bold serif headline: (1) THE WALL STREET JOURNAL, 'Hiring Defied Expectations in March, With 178,00 New Jobs'; (2) POLITICO (red logo), 'Job growth shatters expectations in March, in boost to Trump'; (3) The Washington Post, 'March jobs report blows past expectations'; (4) FOX Business, 'US economy added 178,000 jobs in march, well above expectations'.
notable_text: Hiring Defied Expectations in March, With 178,00 New Jobs; Job growth shatters expectations in March, in boost to Trump; March jobs report blows past expectations; US economy added 178,000 jobs in march, well above expectations
